shared_fields.name: certainty
shared_fields.notes: Cross-cutting confidence marker where explicitly allowed.

shared_fields.name: notes
shared_fields.notes: Cross-cutting explanatory note where explicitly allowed.

blocks.name: language
validation_rules: name is required

blocks.name: entry
validation_rules: at least one of gloss or pos must exist

blocks.name: phonology
validation_rules: at least one of vowels or consonants must exist

blocks.name: grammar
validation_rules: grammar must contain either categories or at least one named strategy section

blocks.name: script
validation_rules: type is required

blocks.name: example

optional_fields.name: uses
optional_fields.notes: Referenced items used in the example.

validation_rules: surface and translation are required

blocks.name: text
validation_rules: text should contain content or at least one segment child block
segment identifiers should be unique within a text block

blocks.name: morpheme

optional_fields.name: allomorphs
optional_fields.notes: Allomorphs as strings, IPA forms, or morpheme refs.

validation_rules: at least one of type or gloss must exist

blocks.name: paradigm
validation_rules: dimensions is required

blocks.name: construction

optional_fields.name: uses
optional_fields.notes: Referenced resources used by the construction.

validation_rules: at least one of pattern or base must exist

blocks.name: soundchange
blocks.description: Sound change block with rule children.
validation_rules: from_stage and to_stage are required
at least one rule child block is required

blocks.name: etymology
validation_rules: at least one of origin or development must exist

blocks.name: stage
validation_rules: name is required

blocks.name: dialect
validation_rules: name is required

blocks.name: register
validation_rules: at least one of name or label must exist

blocks.name: phoneme

optional_fields.name: allophones
optional_fields.notes: Allophones as strings, IPA forms, or refs.

validation_rules: symbol is required

blocks.name: analysis
validation_rules: target is required

blocks.name: irregularity
validation_rules: irregularity should identify a target or explicit relation to a regular expectation

blocks.name: exception_case
validation_rules: exception_case should identify a target and an exception relation

blocks.name: blocking_rule
validation_rules: blocking_rule should specify a blocked target or explicit blocker relation

blocks.name: morph_irregularity
validation_rules: morph_irregularity should target entry or morpheme material

blocks.name: paradigm_irregularity
validation_rules: paradigm_irregularity should target a paradigm

blocks.name: soundchange_exception
validation_rules: soundchange_exception should point to a soundchange context

blocks.name: construction_exception
validation_rules: construction_exception should target a constructional pattern

blocks.name: text_exception
validation_rules: text_exception should distinguish text-bound deviation from system-wide irregularity
